title: Support irrigation work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support irrigation work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare materials, tools and equipment for irrigation work

pcs.text: Identify the required materials, tools and equipment according to lists provided and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the required materials, tools and equipment according to lists provided and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the required materials, tools and equipment according to lists provided and supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Select and check materials, tools and equipment required to carry out routine irrigation work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and check materials, tools and equipment required to carry out routine irrigation work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and check materials, tools and equipment required to carry out routine irrigation work.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to job requirements.

pcs.text: Demonstrate correct manual handling techniques when loading and unloading materials

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Demonstrate correct manual handling techniques when loading and unloading materials.

pcs.text: Report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor.

pcs.text: Provide irrigation support according to work health and safety requirements and supervisor instruction
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide irrigation support according to work health and safety requirements and supervisor instruction?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide irrigation support according to work health and safety requirements and supervisor instruction.

pcs.text: Identify and report workplace hazards to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report workplace hazards to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report workplace hazards to supervisor.
